content.title: Six Pillars of Faith (Iman)
items: 1. To believe in the oneness of Allah (Tawhid).
2. To believe in the angels of Allah.
3. To believe in the revealed books of Allah.
4. To believe in the prophets and messengers of Allah.
5. To believe in the Day of Judgment (Akhirah).
6. To believe in divine decree (Qadar) — that both good and evil come from Allah.

content.title: Five Pillars of Islam
items: 7. To recite the Shahada: 'Ashhadu alla ilaha illallah wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan abduhu wa rasuluh.'
8. To perform the five daily prayers (Salah).
9. To fast during the month of Ramadan (Sawm).
10. To pay the obligatory charity (Zakat).
11. To perform the Hajj pilgrimage at least once in a lifetime if able.

content.title: Twelve Obligations of Prayer (Salah)
items: 12. To be purified from ritual impurity (Hadath) through Wudu, Ghusl, or Tayammum.
13. To be free from physical impurity (Najasah) on the body, clothing, and place of prayer.
14. To cover the private parts (Awrah).
15. To face the Qiblah (direction of the Ka'bah).
16. To pray within the designated prayer time (Waqt).
17. To make the intention (Niyyah) for prayer.
18. To pronounce the opening Takbir: 'Allahu Akbar.'
19. To stand upright (Qiyam) during prayer.
20. To recite verses from the Quran (Qira'at).
21. To perform the bowing (Ruku').
22. To perform the prostration (Sujud).
23. To sit for the final Tashahhud (Qa'da al-Akhira).

content.title: Four Obligations of Wudu (Ablution)
items: 24. To wash the entire face (from the hairline to the chin, ear to ear).
25. To wash both arms up to and including the elbows.
26. To wipe at least one quarter of the head (Masah).
27. To wash both feet up to and including the ankles.

content.title: Three Obligations of Ghusl (Full Purification)
items: 28. To rinse the mouth thoroughly.
29. To rinse the nostrils with water.
30. To wash the entire body without leaving any dry spot.

content.title: Two Obligations of Tayammum (Dry Purification)
items: 31. To make the intention (Niyyah).
32. To strike clean earth and wipe the face and both arms to the elbows.

content.title: Commanding Good and Forbidding Evil (2)
items: 33. To guide people toward good and righteous conduct.
34. To prevent people from wrongdoing and evil.

content.title: Specific to Women (2)
items: 35. For women to know the rulings concerning menstruation (Hayd).
36. For women to know the rulings concerning postpartum bleeding (Nifas).

content.title: Knowledge (1)
items: 37. To seek and impart religious knowledge.
